seo.title: Color Palette Generator | Creative Lab
seo.description: Generate harmonious color palettes from a base color.

product.title: Palette Generator
product.description: Choose a base color and create harmonious combinations for design, branding, interfaces and creative projects.

generator.title: Build your palette
generator.intro: Select a base color, choose a harmony and adjust the result.
generator.resultDescription: Click a color to copy it. Use the lock to keep it.
generator.exportDescription: Copy the palette as HEX, CSS or JSON.

info.title: How to generate a palette with Creative Lab
info.description: Start from a color, select a harmony rule and adjust the palette until it fits your project.
